title: Creepers & Jokers
description: A Balatro-Inspired Mod for Minecraft. Adding Jokers & more to your game.
body:
**VERY EARLY IN DEVELOPMENT !!**
**REQUIRES CURIO API AND PEHKUI API**


**Balatro-Inspired Chaos Meets Minecraft**

♠️♣️♥️♦️Adds Accessories in the form of JOKERS & More to your game.♠️♣️♥️♦️

**🃏 Balatro-Inspired Mechanics:**

Combine Jokers for synergistic effects, but some might have tradeoffs!

Collect, equip, and combo these funny fellows to achieve maximum power, or blow up when trying to shoot a bow...

In theory, you can be incredibly powerful with no competition!
But in practice, _**the house always wins.**_

**V1.0.4 Release Changelog:**  
- First Release.
- Added new Jokers
- MOST hostile mobs now have a 10% chance of dropping Joker Booster Packs, opening each pack gives ONE random joker, with varying odds.
- Updated some Sprites
- USE "." to OPEN the Joker Stats GUI


**Please use the GitHub link provided in the sidebar for discussion of the project**.


 **DEPENDENCIES** 
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
- [https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
